tasks.title: Add PackageDiff struct type

tasks.closed_reason: PackageDiff struct with Added/Removed/Updated/Unchanged, test written first, passes

tasks.acceptance: Test written first. PackageUpdate struct compiles with Name, OldVersion, NewVersion. Test passes.
tasks.closed_reason: PackageUpdate with Name/OldVersion/NewVersion, test written first, passes

tasks.title: Compute added packages from diff
tasks.description: TDD: write test that given old state map and new lock packages, identifies packages present in new but not old as Added
tasks.acceptance: Test written first. Function returns correct Added slice for new packages. Test passes.
tasks.closed_reason: ComputeDiff returns Added packages correctly, TDD test passes

tasks.title: Compute removed packages from diff
tasks.description: TDD: write test that given old state map and new lock packages, identifies packages present in old but not new as Removed
tasks.acceptance: Test written first. Function returns correct Removed slice. Test passes.
tasks.closed_reason: ComputeDiff returns Removed packages correctly, TDD test passes

tasks.title: Compute updated packages from diff
tasks.description: TDD: write test that given old state map and new lock packages, identifies packages in both with different versions as Updated
tasks.acceptance: Test written first. Function returns correct Updated slice with old/new versions. Test passes.
tasks.closed_reason: ComputeDiff returns Updated packages with old+new versions, TDD test passes

tasks.title: Compute unchanged packages from diff
tasks.description: TDD: write test that given old state map and new lock packages, identifies packages in both with same version as Unchanged
tasks.acceptance: Test written first. Function returns correct Unchanged slice. Test passes.
tasks.closed_reason: ComputeDiff returns Unchanged packages correctly, TDD test passes
